content: We can frame the original Self-Refine framework as a single-perspective iterative refinement system, and integrate multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanism research to build a multi-perspective Self-Refine framework that still retains the original's core advantage of requiring no extra training or labeled supervision data. This hybrid framework would address the key limitation of single-perspective Self-Refine where it can get stuck in local optimization loops by repeating its own unrecognized biases.
